couple.brideBio: Add a few lines about Noodhana here — her passions, her spirit, what makes her so wonderfully her. This is her moment to shine.
couple.groomBio: Add a few lines about Venkkatesh here — his warmth, his humor, everything that makes him the perfect partner for this adventure called life.

chapters.label: Chapter One
chapters.title: The Beginning
chapters.body: Every great love story starts with a moment that changes everything. For Noona and Venkkat, it was one of those rare encounters that felt both unexpected and inevitable — the kind you look back on and smile.

chapters.label: Chapter Two
chapters.title: Growing Together
chapters.body: Through shared laughs, late-night conversations and quiet Sunday mornings, they discovered in each other a kindness and warmth that made everything feel right. Two hearts, one journey.

chapters.label: Chapter Three
chapters.title: Forever Begins
chapters.body: Now, with family and friends gathered in Chennai and Madurai, they take the most beautiful step of all — into a lifetime of love, laughter and everything in between.

dressCode.title: Dress Code
dressCode.body: Traditional & Festive. Think silk sarees, kurtas, sherwanis. Celebrate in colour and elegance — the more festive, the better!

giftRegistry.title: Gift Registry
giftRegistry.intro: Your presence is the greatest gift. If you'd like to bless the couple, here are a few ways to do so.

songDedications.title: Song Dedications
songDedications.body: Help curate the perfect playlist! Dedicate a song in the RSVP form below — we'd love to celebrate with songs that mean something to you.
